title: crotalaria peduncularis
intro: Crotalaria peduncularis, also known as the "pedunculated rattlebox," is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria peduncularis include its potential use in treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
